prompt_text: Recommended CRM tools for early-stage startups companies
response:
# Best CRM Tools for Early-Stage Startups

## **Free/Freemium Options** (Great for bootstrapping)

### **HubSpot CRM**
- Genuinely free tier (no time limit)
- Contact management, deals, basic automation
- Excellent for learning CRM fundamentals
- Scales up affordably

### **Zoho CRM**
- Free plan for up to 3 users
- Surprisingly feature-rich
- Good for customization
- Strong value as you grow

### **Pipedrive**
- Free tier available
- Sales-focused, visual pipeline
- Intuitive for non-technical users
- Excellent onboarding

## **Budget-Friendly Paid Options**

### **Salesforce Essentials**
- ~$165/user/month
- Trusted brand, scalable
- Good for teams needing enterprise features later

### **Monday.com CRM**
- Flexible pricing (~$120/month base)
- Visual, customizable interface
- Works well for mixed teams

### **Freshsales**
- Affordable (~$11-99/user/month)
- Email integration, automation
- Good customer support

## **Selection Criteria for Your Startup**

| Consider | Priority |
|----------|----------|
| Team size | 1-5 people → start free |
| Budget | <$100/mo → HubSpot or Zoho |
| Industry | Sales-heavy → Pipedrive |
| Customization needs | High → Zoho or Monday |

## **Pro Tips**

✅ Start with free tier—don't overpay early  
✅ Prioritize ease of use over features  
✅ Check mobile app quality  
✅ Test API/integration capabilities  
✅ Plan 2-year growth before choosing

**What's your startup's focus?** I can recommend more specifically.
